name: Apple Pancakes from the Townships
recipeInstructions:
Crepes aux pommes des Cantons
Sift together flour, baking powder (1 tablespoon), baking soda, salt, sugar, and cinnamon. Beat sour milk and eggs in a small bowl. Add apples, unpeeled and cut into small pieces, and melted butter. Mix well. Cook as you would ordinary pancakes in a greased cast iron frying pan. Brown on both sides. Serve plain or with butter and maple syrup.
